```shell
  @ val keyWithRestrictionsPath = "/tmp/canton/certs/restricted_key.pub"
      keyWithRestrictionsPath : String = "/tmp/canton/certs/restricted_key.pub"

  @ val keyWithRestrictions = participant1.keys.secret.generate_signing_key(name = "RestrictedKey", usage = Set(SigningKeyUsage.Namespace))
      keyWithRestrictions : SigningPublicKey = SigningPublicKey(
        id = 12204c50c08a...,
        format = DER-encoded X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo,
        keySpec = EC-Curve25519,
        usage = namespace
      )

  @ participant1.keys.public.download_to(keyWithRestrictions.id, keyWithRestrictionsPath)
```
